evidence.scope: local reference demonstration, model-free compiled replays
evidence.task: enter exactly one synthetic health-facility claim (insuree, claim number, diagnosis, service) and save it
evidence.oracle: direct SQL read of the openIMIS claims database requiring exactly one non-voided claim row per run, in status Entered, matching the demonstrated insuree number and health facility; pixels and actor self-report never establish success

limitations: One synthetic claims-intake task on one pinned local macOS arm64 environment loaded with the upstream openIMIS demo dataset plus one bootstrapped synthetic policyholder. The media and three verified replays are not a customer deployment, a reliability benchmark, an agent-comparison matrix, adjudication automation, or evidence for a proprietary claims platform, Windows, RDP, or Citrix.
affiliation: OpenAdapt is not affiliated with or endorsed by the openIMIS Initiative.
